title: Phantoms in the End
description: Moves phantoms from the Overworld to the End
body:
## Description

This is a simple Mod that moves Phantoms from the Overworld to the End.

- Phantoms will no longer spawn in the Overworld
- Phantoms will now spawn in the End
- `minecraft:spawn_phantoms` (previously `doInsomnia`) gamerule needs to be enabled for phantoms to spawn in the End
- Unchanged behaviour:
  - Phantom AI
  - Phantoms will have a chance to spawn only if player hasn't slept for +3 game days (spawn chance increases with additional time without rest)
  - Chance and local difficulty affect how many phantoms spawn
- Changed behaviour: 
  - Phantoms now spawn regardless of sea level
  - Low local difficulty will no longer prevent phantoms from spawning at all
  - Time between spawn attempts is 1.5 longer to compensate for no daylight in the end
  - If there are 8+ phantoms in the End, no more phantoms will spawn
  - Phantoms will now spawn even if player is below solid blocks

Note: This mod is likely not compatible with any other mod that adjusts Phantom spawning

### More mods
Do you like this mod? Try some other mods I made, like:
- [Harou's Leashed Fences](https://modrinth.com/mod/harous-leashed-fences)
- [Small Netherite Beacons](https://modrinth.com/mod/small-netherite-beacons) 
- [Harou's Netherite Shulkers ](https://modrinth.com/mod/harous-netherite-shulkers)
